chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.78 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ FRESH CASE: 1. For order on CMA No.652/2025 (Urgent). 2. For order on office objection a/w reply as at “A”. 3. For order on CMA No.571/2025 (Exemption). 4. For hearing of Main Case. 5. For order on CMA No.572/2025 (Stay). ----------- Dated; 23rd April 2025 Mr. Iqbal Khurram, Advocate for Appellant. -*-*-*-*-*- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 4&5. After being confronted as to the judgment impugned herein, whereby, the J.M. No.15/2016 in Suit No.1644/2006 has been dismissed, Appellant’s Counsel, under instructions, does not press this appeal. Ordered accordingly. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE *Farhan/PS*
